reviews.comment:
La vieja y querida estación del ACA de Arrecifes sigue en pie y activa. Con la nueva autopista pensé que se había perdido, pero no, sigue ahí, la autopista se acercó a su lado! Muy tentador todo lo que ofrece el bar, me lo hubiese comido todo, pero la línea es la línea. Observen el cuadrito de la lluvia caída que está en la pared exterior, cerca de los baños. Muy interesante.

(Translated by Google)
The old and beloved ACA station in Arrecifes is still standing and operating. With the new highway, I thought it was gone, but no, it's still there; the highway has moved right up to its side! Everything the bar offers is very tempting; I would have eaten it all, but the line is the line. Take a look at the little picture of the rain that's fallen on the exterior wall, near the restrooms. Very interesting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqc1ktZ3lBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y tienen cosas caseras ya preparadas para comer muy buenas. Sandiwches de todo tipo, tartas y tortas de diferente variedades. El café deberían mejorarlo. Los baños muy limpios. Mención especial para los pastelitos

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and they have delicious homemade meals. They offer all kinds of sandwiches, and a variety of cakes and pastries. The coffee could be improved. The restrooms are very clean. Special mention for the pastries.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREbWRfaDlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésimo. No anda el "sistema" por lo que no te cobran con la app y por lo tanto no aplican el descuento de ACA. Un curro.
Además LLENO de moscas y los baños mugrientos. No debería pertenecer al ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. The "system" isn't working, so they don't charge you through the app and therefore don't apply the ACA discount. It's a rip-off. Plus, it's full of flies and the bathrooms are filthy. It shouldn't belong to the ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEMzRhNEV3EAE
